alien_source.applied_slice: Bit-exact first slice before blocked/CA-LU: route real LU through f64 scratch instead of carrying guaranteed-zero imaginary lanes.

target.profile_backing: frankenjax-p1vbf tracks fj-lax real linalg kernels as active no-gaps perf work. The Criterion target linalg/lu_128x128_f64 isolates eval_lu on a real F64 128x128 matrix and showed complex zero-imaginary scratch as avoidable work.
target.baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass122-lu-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/lu_128x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

one_lever.name: real-valued LU partial-pivot fast path
one_lever.description: Non-complex rank-2 LU inputs now use a real f64 partial-pivot factorization scratch and convert through matrix_to_value at the API boundary. Complex64 and Complex128 inputs continue through the factored complex implementation.

baseline.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass122-lu-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/lu_128x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

after.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass122-lu-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/lu_128x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

delta.confidence: same worker ts2 and non-overlapping Criterion intervals

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The real path preserves the existing LU traversal: columns ascend, pivot scan rows ascend, row swaps update row elements in ascending j, and elimination visits rows then trailing columns ascending.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: The pivot comparison remains strict >, so equal-magnitude pivots keep the first row exactly as the complex path does.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: For zero-imaginary real inputs, complex absolute value, division, multiply, and subtract collapse to the same real scalar operations used here. The proof cases compare exact Literal bits against the factored old complex zero-imaginary path, including signed-zero and infinity inputs. No unsafe, SIMD, BLAS, LAPACK, MKL, XLA, FMA forcing, reassociation, or mixed precision is used.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No random state, seed, sampling order, or nondeterministic iteration path changed.
isomorphism_proof.shape_and_dtype: LU matrix, pivot, and permutation shapes and dtypes match the existing API output contract.
isomorphism_proof.fallback: Complex64 and Complex128 continue through the existing complex implementation.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass122-lu-final-proof cargo test -p fj-lax lu_real_fast_path_bit_identical_to_complex_zero_imag_path -- --nocapture

RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass122-lu-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/lu_128x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
